key_insights.insight: The most fatal place to be is to feel unneeded, which is a significant contributor to male suicide.
key_insights.quote: And the most fatal place to end up in as a human being is to feel unneeded. I think to be needed is arguably the most importantand constant human requirement.

key_insights.insight: The economic rise of women has inadvertently created a crisis of purpose for men, leaving many feeling adrift and uncertain of their role.
key_insights.quote: One consequence of that is to then put a big question mark next to the role of men…there's just a gap. There's a space with a question mark in it now which used to be filled with a whole script.

key_insights.insight: Men are facing two unappetizing options from the right (be more like your father) and from the left (be more like your sister) which is alienating to many young men who do favor equality.
key_insights.quote: From the right, they get the message of like, you should be more like your father or your grandfather,be a real man...But then they're going from the left. The message theyget is you should be more like your sister.

key_insights.insight: Nuance is often lost in digital discourse, and algorithms favor tribal, simplistic ideas, making balanced conversations difficult.
key_insights.quote: The way that the digital world,the algorithms, the social media are designed, is to kind of push you towards camps so this likespace in the middle of nuance it's just not going to get the likes the retweets the engagement.

key_insights.insight: While societal progress has been made regarding women's equality, men are now facing a crisis where the traditional roles and connection to the community are no longer clear.
key_insights.quote: We've just done a really poor job of making sure that even in this time of great transition,we still need you. We need every man, every boy, everybody. We need you.

key_insights.insight: Mature masculinity is about service and generativity, generating a surplus for others, not just economic surplus.
key_insights.quote: Mature men generate more of whatever it is than they need. They're surplus generators. So rather than being surplus to requirements, which is what I think a lot of men feel, they actually generate a surplus for others to use.

key_insights.insight: The decline in institutional connections, like church or community groups, and the rise of online dating apps have contributed to a crisis of loneliness and a lack of female attention for many men.
key_insights.quote: The deinstitutionalization of those community relationships as we've seen these institutions weaken has created a real problem because the needs are still there but it's like we didn't have the organizing framework.

key_insights.insight: The term "toxic masculinity" is a slur which is not helpful to young men and it lacks a clearly defined alternative. Rather, a focus on mature vs immature masculinity offers a better path.
key_insights.quote: I think the term toxic masculinity istoxic i didn't always think that it's taking me a while to get to that but i would now say it'sbasically a slur it's a gender slur if you like.

key_insights.insight: Men and women want a partner who 'has their act together' and women's desire to be with someone who earns more is often a proxy for this more general desire.
key_insights.quote: What they really want is a partner and earning is a reallygood proxy for someone who's got their act together…it's actually justa really good signal right the market the labor market is a very good signal of all kinds of otherskills and so on.

actionable_advice.advice: Prioritize passion in your career path to provide yourself with mojo and verve.
actionable_advice.how_to: Seek a job that aligns with your interests. Don't just chase money; pursue work that excites you and gives you a sense of purpose. Passion and agency are more attractive and fulfilling than a large paycheck.
Actively seek ways to serve your family, community, or broader society. This could involve volunteering, mentoring, helping neighbors, or simply being present and supportive for loved ones.

actionable_advice.advice: Take responsibility and step up in relationships.
actionable_advice.how_to: Be assertive, make plans, and express your desires and needs. Don't be passive or defer all decisions to your partner. Showing agency is a sign of respect and equality.
Engage in activities shoulder-to-shoulder and participate in shared work projects.

memorable_stories: The wife of the guest told him that the problem was that he was not masculine enough.
A colleague of the guest lost her son to suicide at age 16.
Story of a man fresh out of prison breaking down in tears when his new boss said, "I really need you."
contrarian_claims: The term "toxic masculinity" is a slur which does not encourage positive discussions about being a better man.
Turning away from women is the least masculine sentence.
Marriage is better for men and is also a symbol to provide support within relationships.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - The Gender Expert: Men Are Emotionally Dependent On Women & We're Treating Them Like Malfunctioning Women! Richard Reeves
